compartments.label: Intestinal cell
compartments.snippet: Large pink cell labeled 'Intestinal cell' at the bottom of the figure, containing all signaling components.

compartments.label: Nucleus
compartments.snippet: Large oval labeled 'Nucleus' within the intestinal cell, containing transcription factors and target gene labels.

compartments.label: Mitochondria
compartments.snippet: Organelle labeled 'Mitochondria' within the intestinal cell, associated with UPRmt and mtROS.

compartments.label: Lumen
compartments.snippet: Space labeled 'Lumen' at the top-left, where P. aeruginosa and Pyocyanin are depicted.

compartments.label: LRO
compartments.snippet: Organelle labeled 'LRO' (lysosome-related organelle) in the intestinal cell, associated with stress and pH increase.

genes.snippet: Labeled at the apical membrane of the intestinal cell, upstream of the p38 MAPK cascade.
Labeled alongside TIR-1 at the membrane; TIR-1/SARM1 shown together.
Yellow hexagon labeled 'NSY-1 MAPKKK', part of the p38 MAPK cascade.
Yellow hexagon labeled 'SEK-1 MAPKK', downstream of NSY-1 in the cascade.
Yellow hexagon labeled 'PMK-1 p38 MAPK', downstream of SEK-1.
Purple rectangle labeled 'ATF-7' in the nucleus, downstream of PMK-1, activates defense genes.
Purple rectangle labeled 'DAF-16 FOXO' in the nucleus.
Purple rectangle labeled 'SKN-1 Nrf2' in the nucleus.
Purple rectangle labeled 'HSF-1' in the nucleus.
Purple rectangle labeled 'ATFS-1 ATF-4', associated with UPRmt pathway, shown near mitochondria and nucleus.
Purple rectangle labeled 'HIF-1' in the nucleus area, downstream of mitochondrial ROS signaling.
Purple rectangle labeled 'AMPK', shown in the cytoplasm linking mitochondrial signals to downstream effectors.
Purple hexagon labeled 'HSP-60', associated with mitochondria/UPRmt pathway.
Purple rectangle labeled 'ZIP-4', shown in the nucleus area downstream of AMPK/ESRE pathway.
Purple rectangle labeled 'ZIP-2', shown in the nucleus area downstream of ESRE.
Purple rectangle labeled 'CEBP-1/2', shown alongside ZIP-4.
Purple rectangle labeled 'NHR-86 HNF-4', in the nucleus at the right side of the figure.
Teal hexagon labeled 'FSHR-1' at the apical right membrane of the intestinal cell.
Teal hexagon labeled 'PCN' at the apical right, near FSHR-1.

tentative_edges.snippet: Arrow from TIR-1/SARM1 complex to NSY-1 MAPKKK.
Arrow from NSY-1 to SEK-1 in the p38 MAPK cascade.
Arrow from SEK-1 to PMK-1 in the p38 MAPK cascade.
Arrow from PMK-1 to ATF-7 leading to transcription of defense genes in nucleus.
ATF-7, DAF-16, SKN-1, HSF-1 all shown in nucleus driving cellular stress response and antimicrobial defense genes.
ATFS-1 (ATF-4) shown upstream of HSP-60 in UPRmt pathway.
HSP-60 and ATFS-1 connected in UPRmt arm near mitochondria.
UPRmt label on mitochondria with arrow to ATFS-1/ATF-4.
mtROS arrow from mitochondria toward HIF-1 in nucleus.
Arrow from mitochondria/mtROS to AMPK.
Arrow from AMPK toward ZIP-4/CEBP-1 in the ESRE pathway.
Arrow from AMPK to HIF-1 shown in figure.
ZIP-4, CEBP-1/2 and ZIP-2 shown together in ESRE-driven transcription.
FSHR-1 connected via 'Translation' label and arrow toward NHR-86/HNF-4.
PCN shown near FSHR-1 with a '?' arrow toward NHR-86 pathway.

tentative_edges.relation: colonizes intestine and delivers toxic effectors
tentative_edges.snippet: P. aeruginosa shown in lumen releasing Pyocyanin, Pyoverdine, ExoA into intestinal cell, triggering signaling.
LRO stress/pH increase arrow leading to TIR-1/SARM1 activation.

tentative_edges.relation: drives transcription of cellular stress response genes and antimicrobial defense genes
tentative_edges.snippet: Multiple transcription factors (ATF-7, DAF-16, SKN-1, HSF-1, HIF-1, ZIP-4, ZIP-2, CEBP-1, NHR-86) in nucleus labeled as driving cellular stress response genes and antimicrobial defence genes.
ATFS-1 shown with arrow connecting to SKN-1 in nucleus via UPRmt branch.
PMK-1 arrows converge on multiple transcription factors including SKN-1 in the nucleus.
